content.text: I'll start by inspecting the current state of the MongoDB replica set.

input.command: kubectl get ns mongodb 2>&1; echo "---"; kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide 2>&1; echo "---"; kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset,svc 2>&1

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o yaml 2>&1 | head -120

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--config","/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf"],"env":[{"name":"ADMIN_PASSWORD","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"admin-user-password"}}}],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","livenessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":10,"initialDelaySeconds":60,"periodSeconds":15,"timeoutSeconds":5},"name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf","name":"mongod-config","readOnly":true,"subPath":"mongod.conf"}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}},{"configMap":{"items":[{"key":"mongod.conf","path":"mongod.conf"}],"name":"mongod-config"},"name":"mongod-config"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T14:44:03Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "333536"
  uid: a77cd363-e223-4282-aec1-d09980c28ec2
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --config
        - /etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf
        env:
        - name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: admin-user-password
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
              --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          failureThreshold: 10
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 15
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
              --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf
          name: mongod-config
          readOnly: true
          subPath: mongod.conf
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:
          defaultMode: 256
          secretName: mongo-keyfile
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: mongod.conf
            path: mongod.conf
          name: mongod-config
        name: mongod-config
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data-volume
    spec:

content.text: Config comes from a ConfigMap `mongod-config`. Let me read it.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get configmap mongod-config -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  mongod.conf: |
    storage:
      dbPath: /data/db
      wiredTiger:
        engineConfig:
          journalCompressor: zlib
    net:
      bindIpAll: true
    replication:
      replSetName: mongodb-replica
    security:
      authorization: enabled
      keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
    systemLog:
      verbosity: 1
    operationProfiling:
      mode: slowOp
      slowOpThresholdMs: 200
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongod.conf":"storage:\n  dbPath: /data/db\n  wiredTiger:\n    engineConfig:\n      journalCompressor: zlib\nnet:\n  bindIpAll: true\nreplication:\n  replSetName: mongodb-replica\nsecurity:\n  authorization: enabled\n  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile\nsystemLog:\n  verbosity: 1\noperationProfiling:\n  mode: slowOp\n  slowOpThresholdMs: 200\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongod-config","namespace":"mongodb"}}

content.text: Current config: verbosity=1, slowOpThresholdMs=200, journalCompressor=zlib. Let me verify the *live running* values, since journalCompressor is already zlib in the ConfigMap — I need to confirm what's actually running.

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
for i in 0 1 2; do
echo "=== mongodb-replica-$i ==="
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-$i -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'JSON.stringify({verbosity: db.getLogComponents().verbosity, profile: db.getProfilingStatus(), wt: db.serverStatus().wiredTiger[\"concurrentTransactions\"]?undefined:undefined})'" 2>&1
done

content.text: Let me check the live journal compressor value to know the true current setting.

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'var c=db.adminCommand({getCmdLineOpts:1}).parsed; print(JSON.stringify(c.storage)); var wt=db.serverStatus().wiredTiger; var conf=wt[\"uri\"]; ' --eval 'var s=db.serverStatus().wiredTiger; for (k in s){} print(\"---\");' 2>&1"
echo "=== rs status ==="
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name, m.stateStr))'" 2>&1
input.description: Check journal compressor and rs topology

description: Check journal compressor and rs topology

summary: Check journal compressor and rs topology

content.text:
All three current values confirmed: verbosity=1, slowOpThresholdMs=200, journalCompressor=zlib (already the approved standard). Targets: verbosity→2, slowOpThresholdMs→400, journalCompressor stays zlib.

Now I'll update the ConfigMap. Since it's mounted via `subPath` (which never auto-updates), a rolling pod restart is required for any of these to take effect.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/mongod.conf <<'EOF'
storage:
  dbPath: /data/db
  wiredTiger:
    engineConfig:
      journalCompressor: zlib
net:
  bindIpAll: true
replication:
  replSetName: mongodb-replica
security:
  authorization: enabled
  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
systemLog:
  verbosity: 2
operationProfiling:
  mode: slowOp
  slowOpThresholdMs: 400
EOF
kubectl -n mongodb create configmap mongod-config --from-file=mongod.conf=/tmp/mongod.conf --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - 2>&1
echo "=== verify ==="
kubectl -n mongodb get configmap mongod-config -o jsonpath='{.data.mongod\.conf}'

configmap/mongod-config configured

  dbPath: /data/db
  wiredTiger:
    engineConfig:
      journalCompressor: zlib
net:
  bindIpAll: true
replication:
  replSetName: mongodb-replica
security:
  authorization: enabled
  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
systemLog:
  verbosity: 2
operationProfiling:
  mode: slowOp
  slowOpThresholdMs: 400

content.text: ConfigMap updated. Now I'll do a rolling restart so each member picks up the new config. The StatefulSet RollingUpdate goes highest→lowest ordinal (secondaries first, primary last), preserving availability.

input.command:
kubectl -n mongodb rollout restart statefulset mongodb-replica 2>&1
echo "--- polling ---"
kubectl -n mongodb rollout status statefulset mongodb-replica --timeout=300s 2>&1

content.content: Command running in background with ID: b2mpidv0x. Output is being written to: /tmp/claude-20021/-mydata-karma-runs-examples-rerun-mongodb-mongod-config-update-20260618-144349-stages-stage-1/f0a26a4c-daf8-43ea-aa3d-ee468252818c/tasks/b2mpidv0x.output. You will be notified when it completes. To check interim output, use Read on that file path.

content.text: Rollout complete. Now let me verify all three members have the new live settings and the replica set is healthy with data available.

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "=== pods ==="; kubectl -n mongodb get pods
for i in 0 1 2; do
echo "=== mongodb-replica-$i ==="
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-$i -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'var p=db.getProfilingStatus(); var s=db.adminCommand({getCmdLineOpts:1}).parsed.storage.wiredTiger.engineConfig.journalCompressor; print(JSON.stringify({verbosity: db.getLogComponents().verbosity, slowms: p.slowms, mode: p.was, journalCompressor: s}))'" 2>&1
done
echo "=== rs status ==="
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name, m.stateStr, m.health))'" 2>&1
